name: Raspberry Napoleon
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the butter into pieces.
2. In a food processor, combine flour, salt, and butter; pulse until mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Add sour cream and process until dough just holds together.
4. Press into a disc, wrap, and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
5. Flour the dough and roll out between 2 sheets of waxed paper to 1/8 inch thick, about an 11 x 11-inch square. Transfer to baking sheet and prick all over with fork.
6. Refrigerate 30 minutes.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Bake dough until lightly browned, 15-20 minutes. Let cool completely.
9. Trim pastry to an 8 x 8-inch square and cut into eight 2 x 4-inch rectangles.
10. Beat heavy cream with powdered sugar and vanilla until firm peaks form.
11. Pipe half of the whipped cream onto one rectangle using a star tip.
12. Arrange raspberries on top, then pipe second layer over raspberries.
13. Top with remaining rectangles (flat side up).
14. Cover and refrigerate until serving.
15. Dust each Napoleon with powdered sugar before serving.
